title: lastrea christensenii
intro: Lastrea christensenii, also known as Lastrea christensenii, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, which contributes to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Lastrea christensenii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of Lastrea christensenii can be made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water, which can be used as a tea for medicinal purposes.
